CustomField.formula: Planned_Revenue_Jan__c + Planned_Revenue_Feb__c + Planned_Revenue_Mar__c + Planned_Revenue_Aprl__c + Planned_Revenue_May__c + Planned_Revenue_Jun__c + Planned_Revenue_Jul__c + Planned_Revenue_Aug__c + Planned_Revenue_Sept__c + Planned_Revenue_Oct__c + Planned_Revenue_Nov__c + Planned_Revenue_Dec__c
